candidate_definition_hints.text: aria2 is a lightweight multi-protocol & multi-source, cross platform download utility operated in command-line. It supports HTTP/HTTPS, FTP, SFTP, BitTorrent and Metalink.
aria2 - The ultra fast download utility

candidate_glosses.text: aria2 - The ultra fast download utility

source_context_snippet: aria2 - The ultra fast download utility
source_repo_description: aria2 is a lightweight multi-protocol & multi-source, cross platform download utility operated in command-line. It supports HTTP/HTTPS, FTP, SFTP, BitTorrent and Metalink.
